title: successResponse
description: Response object indicating the success of an operation, such as inserting or updating a document

id.description: ID of the document affected by the request operation

created.description: Indicates whether the document was created as a result of the operation

result.description: Result of the operation, typically 'created', 'updated', or 'deleted'

found.description: Indicates whether the document was found in the table

status.description: HTTP status code representing the result of the operation
